description:
About the role
Ray Tech (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd is seeking a talented Software Engineer to join our team in Iskandar Puteri, Johor Bahru, Johor. As a full-time Software Engineer, you will play a crucial role in developing and maintaining cutting-edge software solutions that drive the success of our business, our company are specialized in X-Ray machine and joined high technology AI technique. This is an exciting opportunity to be part of a dynamic and innovative technology company, contributing your expertise to the development of innovative products and services.
What you'll be doing
Design, develop, and implement high-quality software applications and systems
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand and translate business requirements into technical solutions
Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code using best practices and industry standards
Participate in code reviews, testing, and debugging processes to ensure the quality and reliability of our software
Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in the software engineering field
Contribute to the continuous improvement of our software development processes and practices
What we're looking for
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or a related field
Minimum 2-3 years of experience in software development, preferably in a similar role
Proficiency in programming languages such as Java, Python, or C++
Familiarity with software design patterns, data structures, and algorithms
Experience with software development methodologies, such as Agile or Scrum
Strong problem-solving and analytical skills, with the ability to think critically and creatively
Excellent communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams
A passion for staying up-to-date with the latest trends and technologies in the software engineering field
What we offer
At Ray Tech (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd, we are committed to providing our employees with a rewarding and fulfilling work experience. We offer a competitive salary, comprehensive benefits package, and opportunities for professional development and career advancement. Our company culture encourages innovation, collaboration, and a healthy work-life balance.
About us
Ray Tech (Malaysia) Sdn Bhd is a leading provider of innovative technology solutions in the Southeast Asian market. Our mission is to empower businesses with the tools and technologies they need to succeed in the digital age. With a talented and diverse team of professionals, we are dedicated to delivering cutting-edge software products and services that drive the growth and success of our clients.
Apply now for this exciting opportunity to join our team as a Software Engineer!
